creator: pmh@hausen.com
text:
Why not import net/wireguard-tools into base?

Been using it for years, first with the golang based implementation, then with kernel based one.

All you need is:

wireguard_enable="YES"
wireguard_interfaces="wg0"

And then wg0.conf with interface and peer definitions. Routes are installed automatically based on AllowedIPs settings.

What am I missing?
